pages.raw_text:
The Northern Pacific is planning
to build a large depot at Standpoint.
Idaho.


Timber owners will meet at
Occur d. Alene on June / to Or
ganize an association to prevent
forest fires.


Frank Fox, a 10 year old boy,
died yesterday morning at Coma
ga college of typhoid fefer. His
home was at Nez Perez.


Four miles Of road between Lata
and Waverly are to be macadamiz-
ed with rock from the Occur d
Alene mines.


Miss Marie L. Croker and Chas.
L. Haggith were married last night
in the Germond block. Rev. Hen
ry I. Rasmus officiating.


Judge KEENAN, yesterday commit
ted Mary Van Hull to the Home of
the Good Shepherd. She was com
mitted at her own request for lack
Of parental care.


Rev. c. F. Stevens, the new pas
Cor of the Central Christian church
D expected to arrive in Spokane to-
0orrow. He will be installed in
Dis pulpit next Sunday.


The condemnation suits at Col
7ax of the Spokane & Inland Elec.
eric railway have been settled and
Che electric line now has a right of
Way into the town.


The funeral OF George EassGn
was held at 10 o'clock this morn
ing from the home of his mother,
Mrs. Robert Esson. Gordon ave.
nue. and Perry street.


r. g. Mathison, secretary of the
Wonder store. has tra:ed his home
ut 2325 Maiion avenue for 100
acres OF land about four miles
from Spokane directly east of
Sixth avenue.

viii be brought before the meeting
